text: Inside this modern, angular space, surrounded by glass and vibrant colors, I feel a sense of thoughtful anticipation. The R+D wall speaks to curiosity and innovation, evoking a mood both contemplative and alert. It is a place where ideas are alive – I am moved by an undercurrent of possibility, but also slightly overwhelmed by the abundance of stimuli and information, as if each element calls for deeper reflection. Here, amid technical displays and tidy order, wonder mingles with introspection.
